items.title: A Mathematical Theory of Communication (Shannon, 1948)
items.author: Claude E. Shannon
items.note: Original information-theoretic foundation for entropy and expected code length under mismatched distributions.

items.title: PyTorch CrossEntropyLoss documentation
items.author: PyTorch Developers
items.note: Practical API mapping from logits and class indices to average −log q(y).

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Connects cross-entropy, log-likelihood, and classification in a probabilistic framework.
